rule_text: Pre-existing and chronic conditions are excluded for the first 6 months of first scheme membership under Remedy 03; otherwise covered from enrolment. Undeclared pre-existing and chronic conditions are not covered.
Any undeclared pre-existing and chronic conditions are not covered.
Group declaration form applies to groups sized 21 to 50 lives.

Individual health declaration form applies to: groups of 20 lives and below at inception and upon member addition; groups above 20 lives for inception members aged 65 and above and if requested by underwriting; groups above 20 lives for additions to members aged 65 and above or for category change or late additions.
Remedy 03 is applicable for Dubai and Northern Emirates. Not applicable for Abu Dhabi unless a HAAD-compliant plan is selected.
Direct billing is available within the applicable NGI Healthnet network. Reimbursement is generally not allowed unless an explicit benefit or rule grants it.
Deductibles and co-insurance are paid by the member at the point of service.
Hospitals listed in the network are for inpatient services only unless otherwise stated.
Clinics listed in the network are for outpatient services only unless otherwise stated.
Specialist and inpatient referrals are governed by DHA and NGI Healthnet rules.
Minimum group size is 5 lives and maximum group size is 250 lives for Remedy 03.

General reimbursement is NOT allowed for Remedy 03. Reimbursement is only allowed where an explicit benefit row or rule row grants reimbursement for that specific service (e.g. alternative medicine or repatriation of mortal remains or emergency outside network).
Inpatient coinsurance for Remedy 03 is 20 percent with a maximum of AED 500 per incident and AED 1000 per person per year.

Maximum benefit per year is AED 150000.

Area of coverage includes UAE and the Indian Sub-continent and South East Asia excluding Hong Kong and Singapore for elective and emergency treatment while elective inpatient treatment outside UAE remains subject to prior approval.

topic: General term: Pre-existing & Chronic Conditions Subject to Medical Application Form (MAF)
rule_text: Covered up to a limit of AED 150,000 per member per year

topic: General term: Claims Settlement Basis (After application of Copayments)
rule_text: Direct Billing Available. Reimbursement is also possible but will be settled at 80% of the usual & customary rates of the selected Network.

topic: General term: Life Threatening Emergency case within the area of coverage (to be notified with
rule_text: 100% of incurred costs

topic: General term: Cover within the scope of territory, for Elective and Emergency
rule_text: When treatment received for emergency, accident or illnesses first arising after leaving U.A.E. whilst traveling on business or vacation for a maximum of 90 to 150 days within the geographical area, the country actual reasonable and customary prices will apply to inpatient and out -patient services.
